monster.name: MirandaEmerald

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/turn)
trait.text: +2d6 extra damage if she has advantage or an ally in melee with the target

trait.name: Cunning Action
trait.text: Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action

monster.description: A slender woman, sharp features, black hair pulled back in a tight braid. Green eyes — the same color as the emerald she wears as a brooch on her cloak. She dresses with understated elegance, always in black and dark green. Her hands are well-kept, nails short — a scholar's hands, not a fighter's. She speaks with measured calm, every word chosen with surgical precision. She never raises her voice. She rarely smiles, and when she does it's a smile that doesn't reach her eyes. Distinctive trait: cold and calculating. She never acts on impulse. Every move is planned three steps ahead. Role: leader of the Emerald gang (west Orcastle)
